---
title: "ir fixture report"
format: html
ir:
  dependencies:
    - dplyr
    - tidyr
    - glue
    - knitr
    - rmarkdown
---

```{r}
pkgs <- c("dplyr", "tidyr", "glue")
available <- vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)
stopifnot(all(available))

lib <- normalizePath(.libPaths()[[1]], winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
expected <- normalizePath(Sys.getenv("IR_EXPECT_CACHE_DIR"), winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
libraries <- file.path(expected, "libraries")
# The declared packages must be physically in the run library, not merely
# loadable from a system or site copy that --isolated leaves on the path. Check
# the DESCRIPTION at the library path rather than resolving find.package(),
# since renv symlinks the package dir to its global cache.
pkgs_in_cache <- startsWith(lib, libraries) &&
  all(file.exists(file.path(lib, pkgs, "DESCRIPTION")))

data <- dplyr::tibble(group = c("a", "b", "a"), value = c(1L, 2L, 3L)) |>
  dplyr::group_by(group) |>
  dplyr::summarise(total = sum(value), .groups = "drop") |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = total)

cat("ir.fixture=qmd\n")
cat("qmd.lib_in_cache=", tolower(startsWith(lib, libraries)), "\n", sep = "")
cat("qmd.pkgs_in_cache=", tolower(pkgs_in_cache), "\n", sep = "")
cat(glue::glue("qmd.result=a:{data$a},b:{data$b}"), "\n", sep = "")
```
